$comment: JSON Schema for corpus/ground_truth/<documento_id>_gt.json. Contract: .claude/schemas/ground-truth.md. Sub-objects with relaxed additionalProperties: (1) campos — keys are dynamic field names (transmitente_N_nome, onus_N_tipo, proprietario_N_cpf_cnpj, etc.) that vary by document type and number of parties; static enumeration would reject valid documents. (2) texto_completo_por_pagina — keys are string-encoded page numbers, count depends on total_paginas.

anotador_secundario.$comment: Non-null for all 30 calibration corpus documents; may be null for documents 31–145 with 20% random re-annotation. minLength applies only when type is string.

resolucao_discordancias.$comment: Must be non-null when discordancias_resolvidas is true; semantic constraint enforced by validator script.

campos.$comment: additionalProperties: true (open object) — field keys are dynamic: transmitente_N_nome, transmitente_N_cpf, adquirente_N_cpf, onus_N_tipo, proprietario_N_nome, etc. The N suffix and the field vocabulary are defined per document type in Section 17 of the plan, making a closed static set impractical and incorrect.

valor.$comment: Unconstrained — semantics depend on field: string for names/CPF/dates, integer (cents) for monetary values, boolean for flags, null when field is absent and obrigatorio is false.

texto_completo_por_pagina.$comment: additionalProperties: true — keys are string page numbers (e.g. '1', '2'); count and values are document-specific.

checklist_gabarito.$comment: All 34 checklist items (item_01..item_34) are required per validation rule 7. Values are 'OK', 'NAO_ATENDE', 'NAO_APLICA' or field-specific strings.
